title: Speculative Decoding
description: Implement speculative decoding to significantly accelerate inference speed for low-latency applications. Utilize a small 'Draft Model' to predict tokens and a large 'Target Model' to verify them.
objectives: Implement speculative decoding to significantly accelerate inference speed for low-latency applications.
Utilize a small 'Draft Model' to predict tokens and a large 'Target Model' to verify them.
